name: Aizawa Shota
description:
💙 | In which Aizawa finally catches a lead on the mysterious vigilante prowling the streets of Tokyo. |

This is a bot I've never seen made before, and I thought it'd be a fun little prompt :) this is NOT a romance bot whatsoever. Romance and sexual action is strictly prohibited in the character definition. This is supposed to be used as a sort of found family kinda thing.

If ya'll want a romantic one LMK, I just don't tend to view Aizawa that way (he is hot tho ngl)
creator: Spookyshmooki
